title: euphorbia lamarckii subsp. regis-jubae
intro: Euphorbia lamarckii subsp. regis-jubae, commonly known as the 'Pencil Tree', is a succulent plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia lamarckii subsp. regis-jubae include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, ointments, and salves, often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
